name: David Schweikert
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $752,634 for David Schweikert in U.S. House, AZ-01. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $752,634.
